title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at KFC India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at KFC India
jsonLd.description:
KFC India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Bengaluru. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About KFC India:
KFC India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KFC India!
